Rhys Banerjee

Full-Stack Engineer

Hi there, I'm Rhys. I'm a software engineer and full-stack developer from Duke University.

I am a full-stack engineer who also

  • Interested in full-stack software development, software architecture, AI and ML, and game development
  • I draw cartoons in Clip Studio Paint and make animations in Adobe Flash CS6.
  • I play piano. Big fan of music in general.
  • I like tinkering around with the Godot game engine.

Résumé

Principal Financial Group

Software Engineer

Aug 2023 — Present · Remote

  • Built core UI features for an internal retirement plan management platform using React and Next.js.
  • Engineered full-stack configuration workflows for 100+ plan services, reducing manual ops overhead.
  • Designed secure GraphQL integrations between AWS Lambda and Salesforce using Secrets Manager and DynamoDB.
  • Led migration from MuleSoft REST APIs to GraphQL — estimated 30–50% improvement in data efficiency.
  • Modernized CI/CD pipelines from Jenkins to GitHub Actions, improving deployment reliability.

Principal Financial Group

Software Engineer Intern

May 2022 — Aug 2022 · Remote

  • Built a single-page app to replace legacy employee data systems using React, Angular, and Java REST APIs.
  • Won company-wide Intern Code Jam (team of five) under the theme "Inner Source."

Duke University · CS+ & OIT

2020 — 2021 · Durham, NC
